concerns.text: FR-006 mandates 1,000 label permutations on the full dataset. The plan overrides this to a 100-subject subset, but no task explicitly implements the logic to select this stratified subset or document the deviation in the ResultReport as required by the plan's own 'Plan Override' note. T022 mentions 'stratified a subset' but lacks the implementation task for the selection logic itself.

SC-003 requires sensitivity analysis across 9 combinations of variance thresholds and PCA retention. T024 implements the loop, but there is no explicit task to handle the 'all edges removed' edge case (Spec Edge Case 2) where variance thresholding might eliminate all features, potentially causing a crash in the nested CV loop.

FR-009 mandates aborting if wall-clock time exceeds 5 hours. T025 implements monitoring, but there is no task explicitly handling the 'partial results' save logic for the sensitivity analysis (T024) or permutation test (T022) if the abort is triggered, despite the plan's 'Graceful Shutdown' note. T025b covers T022/T024 but the dependency chain for T024's partial save is not explicitly tagged to the abort trigger.

T005 specifies fetching 'sleep.csv' while the Plan and Spec Assumptions refer to 'hcp1200_behavioral_data.csv' or 'sleep.csv' within a specific directory. The task description is ambiguous and risks fetching the wrong file or failing if the filename differs from the assumption.

SC-004 requires the plot to include at least the top 50 connections. T031 mentions 'top N (configurable)', but there is no task ensuring the default configuration or validation logic enforces N >= 50 if fewer than 50 non-zero coefficients exist, or handling the case where N < 50 but the spec requires 50.
